Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes, and elevated LDL cholesterol, which increases cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and lipid management, along with lifestyle modification.
